allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: Comprehensive Git Guide with MkDocs setup *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Update site URL in mkdocs configuration *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add Python requirements file for MkDocs *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix MkDocs configuration directory structure *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix internal markdown links for MkDocs *)
